title: Cape Verde 2026 FIFA World Cup Squad: All 26-Players List, Full Roster - Soccergraph
original_text:
A towering and composed centre-back currently shining at Villarreal. He’ll be the cornerstone of the defence against top attackers.

The midfield general. Technically strong, creative and a natural leader who sets the tempo. Garry Rodrigues

Experienced winger with pace and flair who can produce magic moments. Nuno da Costa

Versatile and clinical forward who poses a constant goal threat. Helio Varela

One of the exciting young prospects in the squad — skilful, direct and full of potential. Ryan Mendes

A reliable veteran whose work rate and quality bring balance to the attack. Group Stage Fixture Cape Verde face an extremely tough draw:vs Spain – 15 June

Group B Squads : Canada , Bosnia Herzegovina , Qatar , Switzerland .

Group C Squads : Brazil , Morocco , Haiti, Scotland .

Group D Squads : USMNT, Paraguay , Australia , Turkey .

Group E Squads : Germany , Curaçao , Ivory Coast , Ecuador .

Group F Squads : Netherlands , Japan , Sweden , Tunisia .

Group H Squads : Spain . Cape Verde , Saudi Arabia Uruguay .

Group I Squads : France , Senegal , Iraq , Norway .

Group J Squads : Argentina . Algeria . Austria . Jordan .

Group K Squads : Portugal . DR Congo . Uzbekistan . Colombia .

Group L Squads : England . Croatia . Ghana Panama.
_note: 全文走 summary 块A(LLM三判后只增不改);processed=成熟仓库累积,raw=本次收集过程。
